Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Randy Cura vs. Alexandre Bouderbane

Video.summary: Tara LaRosa is a former student of all-world fighter Royce Gracie. She takes on perhaps the only woman who has a fighting chance to put the hurt on her…Amanda Buckner.
Video.grandparentTitle: Bodog Fight - Episode 3
Video.title: Bodog Fight - Episode 3

Image.alt: Bodog Fight - Episode 3
Bodog Fight - Episode 3

Video.summary: Any world-class MMA fighter is fearless. Then there’s Nick Agallar who spent 16 months serving his country in Iraq. His opponent Debrah is lightning fast, dishes out lethal strikes and got a few grappling lessons from the Gracie clan along the way.
Video.grandparentTitle: Bodog Fight - Episode 4
Video.title: Bodog Fight - Episode 4

Image.alt: Bodog Fight - Episode 4
Bodog Fight - Episode 4

Video.summary: What do you do when an injury prevents you from competing in what you love? Anett Meszaros suffered a serious leg injury that put her Brazilian Jiu Jitsu lifestyle in jeopardy. Ken Sumner sruggles with intense strain on his fingers, reducing how effective he can be with grappling.
Video.grandparentTitle: After The Fight - Ken Sumner/Anett Meszaros
Video.title: After The Fight - Ken Sumner/Anett Meszaros

Image.alt: After The Fight - Ken Sumner/Anett Meszaros

Video.summary: Welterweight Wisniewski wants payback, after Jorge Masvidal used his training in underground, and barely legal fights, to whip Keith’s brother in a previous match. This fight features Masvidal’s freestyle technique and utter disregard for danger versus Wisniewski’s appetite for vengeance.
Video.grandparentTitle: Bodog Fight - Episode 1
Video.title: Bodog Fight - Episode 1

Image.alt: Bodog Fight - Episode 1

Video.summary: MMA Veteran Nick Thompson goes up against the brute force of wrestling star Davion Peterson. Thompson has more pro fight experience than anyone on the first series, and will need all of it to hold his own against the relentless Peterson.
